productDisplayName: Nike Women Dunk High Skinny Olive Casual Shoes
description: The nike Dunk High Skinny for women is a reinterpretation of the classic nike Dunk High VT Premium: classic top-flight construction. A vintage Basketball icon from 1985, the Nike Dunk High shoe is updated with high-quality material and the same superb cushioning and comfort as the original. Wear these high-tops to show off your vintage Sports knowledge &ndash the premium shine of these patent leather shoes will look great along with jeans and a bright coloured tee. UpperPatent leather upper for comfort, moulded for great stylePerforations on toe for ventilationHigh top style to support ankleTop-stitching and haul loop on back heelStylish lace-up system for a customised snug FitPadded collar and tongue and mesh on tongue innerBranding etched on tongueMidsoleEVA midsole for cushioningMidsole stitched to shoe for strength and styleOutsoleRubber outsole for durability and tractionPivot point and grooves for traction and gripShoe careWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
